text:
Four attempts with no code on T-Mobile, while other texts come through fine, points to something on our end worth a direct look rather than a retry loop.

This needs to go through identity verification before any reset on the account — I'm routing it to our security ops team. They'll need to confirm a few details with you to verify it's your account before unlocking anything.

In the meantime, double-check the phone number on file is current, and confirm the email on the account too in case they need to reach you that way.

Novig Support
